channel.title: 420Blazin Blog
channel.description: Cannabis culture, terpene-based strain guides, honest gear reviews, and Cleveland cannabis from Blazin Bill.

item.title: Your Doctor Said Stop Smoking. Your Terpenes Don't Have To Go.
item.description: When you have to put the flower down — heart, lungs, a surgery, a new job — most edibles can't replace it, because 4 in 5 are terpene-dead distillate. How to find the full-spectrum, dose-dialed edibles that carry a strain's character.

item.title: How to Clean a Weed Grinder the Right Way
item.description: Clean your grinder without wrecking it: which alcohol to use (and why vodka fails), the freezer trick, material-by-material methods, and kief & screen care.

item.title: How to Smoke Hash the Right Way: A Beginner's Guide
item.description: New to hash? Learn the safe, low-waste ways to smoke or vape it — crumble it on flower, use a vaporizer, or roll a hash hole — and why a torch ruins it.

item.title: Memorial Day Cannabis Plan 2026: Three Strains, Three Joints
item.description: A three-day weekend, a three-joint plan: Pineapple Fruz for wake-and-bake, Peninsula Gardens Runtz for daytime, Purple Push Pop for sleep. Strain notes + pacing tips inside.

item.title: Why “10mg” Gummies Aren't 10mg
item.description: Lab studies show most edible labels miss the mark — and individual gummies in the same bag vary too. Here's what causes dosage drift, and three practical ways to stop getting surprised.

item.title: Cannabis Brownies Without the Blackout
item.description: The cannabis brownie recipe most stoners actually need: real decarb temperatures, the dosage math nobody else does, and why the 1-hour rule will save you from the ER. Plus the science of why edibles hit so much harder.

item.title: Half Baked + Sour Diesel: The Perfect Stoner Movie Pairing
item.description: Why Sour Diesel is the perfect strain pairing for Half Baked (1998). The terpene science behind the comedy enhancement, where to find Sour Diesel in Cleveland, and the right vaporizer for the session.

item.title: Best Dry Herb Vaporizers 2026
item.description: The best dry herb vaporizers of 2026, ranked by someone who actually cares about terpenes. Venty, Mighty+, Solo 3, Lobo, XMAX V3 Pro — tested with real flower, real opinions.

item.title: Tasting Notes: Runtz by Peninsula Gardens
item.description: First in the $600 haul series. Peninsula Gardens Runtz delivered non-stop laughter on 4/20 night. Terpene breakdown, grower spotlight, and why Thomas was right again.

item.title: The Nose Knows: Shop Cannabis by Smell
item.description: A $600 dispensary trip, a science-minded budtender named Thomas, and the terpene smell test that changed everything. Why your nose is the best strain-selection tool you own.

item.title: Dry Herb Vaporizer Guide for Beginners
item.description: Everything you need to know about dry herb cannabis vaporizers in 2026. Best devices ranked, terpene temperature science, the step-up method, and tips from grind to draw.

item.title: Wake & Bake Protocol: Morning Strains
item.description: Three science-backed morning cannabis strains and where to find them at Cleveland-area dispensaries. Jack Herer, Durban Poison, and Sour Diesel terpene guide.
